name: spinner
description: Activity indicator with optional text label, size variants, and color override.

props.name: label
props.description: Optional text label displayed below the spinner

props.name: color
props.description: Color of the spinner; defaults to the primary theme color

props.name: style
props.description: Additional style applied to the container or the ActivityIndicator

examples.label: Example 1
Example 2
examples.code:
// Custom color matching a specific brand context
<Spinner size="small" color={theme.colors.secondary} />

examples.label: Example 3
examples.code:
// Spinner inside a button when submitting
{isSubmitting ? <Spinner size="small" /> : <Button onPress={submit}>Send</Button>}

examples.label: Example 4
examples.code:
// Centered in a screen as a fallback loading state
<View style={{ flex: 1, justifyContent: 'center', alignItems: 'center' }}>
  <Spinner label="Fetching results…" />
</View>
